attributes.title: [Apache OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Apache HTTP Server health and performance from OpenTelemetry metrics.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"panelIndex": "887981e6-1ee5-4087-096b-af81cff49944", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 12, "i": "887981e6-1ee5-4087-096b-af81cff49944"}, "type": "visualization", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "savedVis": {"type": "markdown", "id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [Apache OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of Apache HTTP Server health and performance via OpenTelemetry metrics:
- Request rate and traffic throughput
- Worker pool utilization (busy vs idle)
- Active and asynchronous connection counts
- Server load averages (1m, 5m, 15m)
- CPU load and CPU time breakdown by mode
